subject: Math

lesson.story_mission: Join the Operations Trail team to fluently multiply and divide within 100 using strategies.
lesson.mini_lesson: Fluently multiply and divide within 100 using strategies.
lesson.objective: Fluently multiply and divide within 100 using strategies.
lesson.concept_explanation: Fluently multiply and divide within 100 using strategies. Use models, equations, and careful checking to explain each answer.
lesson.common_misconception: Learners may choose an operation too quickly or miss how the model connects to the equation.
lesson.real_world_connection: These skills help solve classroom supplies, games, snacks, teams, and sharing situations.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read the situation, build the model, write the equation, solve, and check with an inverse or another strategy.
hints: Read the problem and name what is known.
Use the model to connect numbers to an equation.
Check that the answer matches the question asked.

misconception_bank.fact_recall_gap: Learner may not know a fact yet and needs a strategy.
misconception_bank.inverse_fact_confusion: Learner may not connect related multiplication and division facts.
misconception_bank.skip_count_error: Learner may skip too far or too few times.
misconception_bank.multiplication_division_mixup: Learner may choose multiplication when division is asked or reverse the operation.

game_theme.title: Multiplication and Division Fluency
game_theme.mission_intro: Complete the Operations Trail by proving you can fluently multiply and divide within 100 using strategies.
